calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Shauer appeared by telephone for Holger Siegwart (Executor).

Mr. Shauer stated that the disclaimer is invalid and not effective due to the length of time between the Decedent's date of death and the signature on the disclaimer. The Court granted the Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-11-2019 Continued To Mar-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Continued To Mar-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-28-2019 Continued To Feb-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Schauer for Shannon O'Rourke (Executor).

Mr. Schauer stated that he was informed that Ms. O'Rourke will be singing the amended petition for final distribution today, and that he believes it will be filed today and it will address all of the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Final Report of Executor, etc. is continued to February 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Continued To Jan-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Schauer appeared by CourtCall for petitioner Shannon O'Rourke.

Mr. Schauer advised the Court that he was waiting to get the amended petition back from his client, and requested that the matter be continued for three weeks. The matter was continued to January 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse. (Not reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Report on Status of Administration and Request for Extension of Time is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for July 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on July 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution has not been filed.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition To Approve A Second Status Report
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Continued To Dec-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Matthew Schauer appeared by telephone for Shannon O'Rourke (Executor).

Mr. Schauer requested a one month continuance, stated that the only issue is with the Decedent's Caregiver who alleges that the Decedent gave him a life estate, that they are working on settlement and that he is waiting to hear back. Status on filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is continued to December 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Z. Grimaldi. Not reported.
